profile.positioningStatement: Full-Stack Software Engineer specializing in Backend Systems, Cloud Infrastructure, DevOps, Automation, Distributed Systems, and Modern Web Applications. Delivers complete solutions across frontend, backend, distributed processing, cloud infrastructure, and DevOps automation — turning ideas into reliable, observable, and highly operable platforms.

professionalSummary: Full-Stack Software Engineer with 4 years of hands-on experience designing, building, deploying, and scaling production-grade systems. Specializes in backend systems, cloud infrastructure, DevOps automation, distributed systems, and modern web applications. Delivers complete solutions across frontend, backend, distributed processing, cloud infrastructure, and DevOps automation — turning ideas into reliable, observable, and highly operable platforms.

professionalExperience.overview: Design and implement cloud-native backend infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, automation systems, distributed backend services, and production deployment workflows.
responsibilities: Design and implement cloud-native backend infrastructure on AWS
Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and GitLab CI/CD
Develop Infrastructure as Code solutions using CloudFormation and Terraform
Configure containerized deployments using Docker and AWS ECS
Build event-driven backend services using AWS SNS, SQS, and EventBridge
Implement observability using CloudWatch, OpenTelemetry, Prometheus, Grafana, and Loki
Automate software delivery, deployment, monitoring, and operational workflows
Improve security, deployment reliability, and production automation

professionalExperience.overview: Develop modern React and React Native applications for multiple client projects, focusing on user experience, reusable components, API integration, and scalable frontend architecture.
responsibilities: Develop React and React Native applications
Build reusable UI components and application layouts
Integrate REST APIs and backend services
Implement authentication and role-based workflows
Manage application state and frontend architecture
Optimize application performance and responsiveness
Collaborate with backend developers and designers

professionalExperience.overview: Develop a React Native mobile commerce application integrated with a headless Shopify backend.
responsibilities: Develop mobile application features using React Native
Integrate Shopify GraphQL APIs
Build product catalog and order management workflows
Synchronize inventory and order information
Improve application performance and usability
Collaborate with backend and product teams

professionalExperience.overview: Work on full-stack web applications across e-commerce, restaurant management, and financial workflow systems using the MERN stack.
responsibilities: Develop backend APIs using Node.js and Express
Build React-based frontend applications
Design MongoDB data models
Implement authentication and authorization
Integrate third-party services and cloud storage
Develop workflow-based business applications
flagshipProjects: Tax Rebate Processing & Refund Management Platform

professionalExperience.overview: Deliver freelance MERN stack projects for international clients, building responsive web applications and REST APIs while managing complete project lifecycles from requirements to deployment.
responsibilities: Build full-stack MERN applications
Develop REST APIs using Node.js and Express
Build React user interfaces
Design MongoDB database schemas
Deploy client applications
Maintain client communication and project delivery

classification.businessDomain: Procurement intelligence and government tender data extraction
classification.architectureStyle: Queue-based distributed worker system with Playwright automation and ETL pipelines

projects.overview: Distributed data extraction system processing 50+ government portals using queue-based Playwright workers and ETL pipelines. Delivered automated ~5-minute cycles with 20 parallel workers.
engineeringContributions: Designed distributed scraping system with 20 parallel workers completing extraction and processing cycles in ~5 minutes per batch
Built queue-based Playwright workers and ETL pipelines for transformation and processing
Implemented validation, deduplication, and checkpoint recovery patterns
measurableOutcomes: Reduced processing from hours of manual effort to ~5-minute automated cycles with 20 parallel workers

classification.businessDomain: Cloud processing platform and asynchronous backend operations
classification.architectureStyle: Event-driven cloud platform using AWS CloudFormation, ECS Fargate, SNS/SQS, MongoDB, Redis pub/sub, and full observability

projects.overview: Production-grade event-driven processing system using AWS CloudFormation, ECS Fargate, SNS/SQS, MongoDB, and Redis pub/sub with full observability (OpenTelemetry, X-Ray, Prometheus, Loki).
engineeringContributions: Built production-grade event-driven processing system using AWS CloudFormation, ECS Fargate, SNS/SQS
Implemented Redis pub/sub for real-time communication
Designed comprehensive observability with OpenTelemetry, X-Ray, Prometheus, and Loki
Configured retry logic, dead-letter queues, circuit breakers, and failure isolation
measurableOutcomes: Improved failure isolation, monitoring, traceability, and recoverability for production workloads

identity.name: Tax Rebate Processing & Refund Management Platform

classification.businessDomain: Tax rebate processing, financial workflow, refund management
classification.architectureStyle: State-controlled workflow platform for onboarding, verification, document processing, calculation, review, approval, and reconciliation

projects.overview: Workflow-driven tax rebate lifecycle platform replacing manual forms, spreadsheet tracking, and fragmented approval processes. Built a state-controlled financial workflow engine for customer onboarding, identity verification, document processing, configurable tax calculations, staff review, refund approval, and refund reconciliation.
engineeringContributions: Built state-controlled financial workflow engine for customer onboarding, identity verification, document processing, tax calculations, staff review, refund approval, and reconciliation
Replaced manual forms, spreadsheet tracking, and fragmented approval processes
Implemented strict state transitions and permission control
measurableOutcomes: Centralized onboarding, document processing, review, approval, and reconciliation for more reliable and auditable refund workflow execution

classification.businessDomain: Software delivery automation and release operations
classification.architectureStyle: Automated delivery pipeline covering build, test, security scanning, containerization, deployment, monitoring, and rollback

projects.overview: Automated build, test, security scanning, containerization (Docker), and deployment pipeline with full observability and rollback.
engineeringContributions: Automated build, test, security scanning, Docker containerization, and deployment pipeline
Implemented Infrastructure as Code using Terraform and CloudFormation
Configured rollback support and zero-downtime deployment patterns
Built full observability with monitoring and rollback capabilities
measurableOutcomes: Reduced manual deployment effort and improved release repeatability with automated delivery pipeline

classification.businessDomain: Content aggregation and intelligent news classification
classification.architectureStyle: Layered processing system with multi-source web scraping, AI classification engine, REST API layer, and unified timeline interface

projects.overview: Intelligent content consolidation system with web scraping, AI-based classification, and unified timeline interface for structured news consumption across multiple sources.
engineeringContributions: Built intelligent content consolidation system with web scraping and AI-based classification
Designed unified timeline interface for structured news consumption across multiple sources
Implemented multi-source data aggregation and transformation pipelines
measurableOutcomes: Unified access to multiple news sources with AI-driven categorization
Reduced cognitive load in information consumption through structured, categorized feeds

classification.architectureStyle: Headless Shopify mobile commerce integration using React Native and Shopify GraphQL

projects.overview: Headless Shopify integration using React Native and ShopifyGraphQL with real-time inventory and order synchronization.
engineeringContributions: Developed React Native mobile commerce application integrated with headless Shopify backend
Implemented Shopify GraphQL APIs for commerce data integration
Built real-time inventory and order synchronization
measurableOutcomes: Delivered mobile commerce experience over a headless Shopify backend
Synchronized inventory and orders between mobile app and commerce backend

engineeringAchievements: Designed distributed scraping system with 20 parallel workers completing full extraction + processing cycles in ~5 minutes per batch (down from hours of manual effort)
Reduced full environment provisioning to single-command deployment using Infrastructure-as-Code (Terraform/CloudFormation)
Built stateless architectures enabling seamless horizontal scaling with zero downtime
Implemented comprehensive observability (Prometheus, Grafana, OpenTelemetry, CloudWatch) that reduced mean time to detection on production issues
